name: memory-sentinel
title: Memory Sentinel
description: Monitor process memory usage and send alerts when apps cross configured thresholds.
author: naranjax

commands.name: memory-monitor-dashboard
commands.title: Open Memory Monitor
commands.description: Review current memory usage, manage custom rules, and run scans manually.

commands.name: background-memory-scan
commands.title: Run Memory Scan
commands.description: Periodically scans running processes and sends notifications for high memory usage.

preferences.name: defaultThresholdGb
preferences.title: Default Threshold (GB)
preferences.description: Notify when a process exceeds this amount of memory unless a rule overrides it.

preferences.name: notificationCooldownMinutes
preferences.title: Notification Cooldown (Minutes)
preferences.description: Minimum time before notifying again about the same matching process.
